commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh This is the law of the house; Upon the top of the mountain the whole area round about shall be most holy. Behold, this is the law of the house. Nothing but the temple shall be on this mountain. It shall be wholly consecrated to the Lord. This was ill observed. The Asmonean princes erected the famous tower Antonia, at the north side. (Josephus) See ver. The Jews assert that it was unlawful to spit on this ground, but no such thing is specified in Josephus or in Scripture, only we find that none were to go out by the same door at which they had entered, (chap. ; Calmet) except the king.

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
